ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request To Set Case For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Lynn O'Maley-Taylor, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, STATE FARM GENERSL INSURANCE COMPANY, a coarporation.

Diana Chui and Joe Klein sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CUONG LAM, an individual
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $109,347.38
Pre-Judgment Interest: $24,556.73
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $674.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $134,578.91
Judgment signed in open court.
